packageRules.description: The npm alias @cplieger/web-terminal-engine-v3 pins the PREVIOUS published decoder (the wire-v3 baseline) for the cross-version compatibility gate in web/. It advances only deliberately, together with the frozen wire-golden fixtures, when a receiver floor is raised — a bot bump to the current release would silently turn the compat gate into current-vs-current and gut its meaning (Renovate proposed exactly that in PR #337). ignoreDeps above does the blocking; this rule documents it beside the other rules.
